title: Getting Started with gepabds
text: gepabds package provides tools analyzing gene expression data stored SummarizedExperiment objects. vignette shows compute expression statistics selected genes.

title: Getting Started with gepabds
code: data(example_se)  example_se #> class: SingleCellExperiment  #> dim: 200 30  #> metadata(0): #> assays(2): counts logcounts #> rownames(200): KBTBD4 ZNF423 ... MMAA SLC31A2 #> rowData names(2): symbol chr #> colnames(30): D31-5_83 D31-4_92 ... D31-1_87 D31-3_64 #> colData names(4): label donor plate sizeFactor #> reducedDimNames(0): #> mainExpName: endogenous #> altExpNames(1): ERCC

title: Authors and Citation
text: Vijayanand M (2026). gepabds: Gene Expression Profiler Single-Cell RNA-seq Data. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/lvmedha/gepabds.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gepabds: Gene Expression Profiler for Single-Cell RNA-seq Data},   author = {Medha Vijayanand},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/lvmedha/gepabds}, }

what: Gene Expression Profiler for Single-Cell RNA-seq Data
title: Gene Expression Profiler for Single-Cell RNA-seq Data
text: goal gepabds provide tools analyzing visualizing gene expression patterns single-cell RNA-seq data. enables per-group expression summaries, gene specificity scoring, visualization marker genes using datasets.

title: Gene Expression Profiler for Single-Cell RNA-seq Data
text: can install development version gepabds GitHub :
code: install.packages("remotes") #> Installing package into 'C:/Users/mvijayan/AppData/Local/R/win-library/4.5' #> (as 'lib' is unspecified) #> package 'remotes' successfully unpacked and MD5 sums checked #>  #> The downloaded binary packages are in #>  C:\Users\mvijayan\AppData\Local\Temp\Rtmpe0TRJx\downloaded_packages remotes::install_github("lvmedha/gepabds") #> Using GitHub PAT from the git credential store. #> Downloading GitHub repo lvmedha/gepabds@HEAD #> These packages have more recent versions available. #> It is recommended to update all of them. #> Which would you like to update? #>  #> 1: All                          #> 2: CRAN packages only           #> 3: None                         #> 4: S7 (0.2.1 -> 0.2.1-1) [CRAN] #>  #> S7 (0.2.1 -> 0.2.1-1) [CRAN] #> Skipping 4 packages not available: SummarizedExperiment, SingleCellExperiment, scuttle, scRNAseq #> Installing 1 packages: S7 #> Installing package into 'C:/Users/mvijayan/AppData/Local/R/win-library/4.5' #> (as 'lib' is unspecified) #>  #>   There is a binary version available but the source version is later: #>    binary  source needs_compilation #> S7  0.2.1 0.2.1-1              TRUE #> installing the source package 'S7' #> Warning in i.p(...): installation of package 'S7' had non-zero exit status #> ── R CMD build ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>          checking for file 'C:\Users\mvijayan\AppData\Local\Temp\Rtmpe0TRJx\remotesa24830b115da\lvmedha-gepabds-525cb12/DESCRIPTION' ...  ✔  checking for file 'C:\Users\mvijayan\AppData\Local\Temp\Rtmpe0TRJx\remotesa24830b115da\lvmedha-gepabds-525cb12/DESCRIPTION' (718ms) #>       ─  preparing 'gepabds': #>    checking DESCRIPTION meta-information ...     checking DESCRIPTION meta-information ...   ✔  checking DESCRIPTION meta-information #>       ─  checking for LF line-endings in source and make files and shell scripts (577ms) #>   ─  checking for empty or unneeded directories #>       ─  building 'gepabds_0.0.0.9000.tar.gz' #>       #>  #> Warning: package 'gepabds' is in use and will not be installed library(gepabds) library(SingleCellExperiment)  data(example_se)  # safe genes genes <- rownames(example_se)[1:4]  # 1. Expression statistics stats <- compute_expr_stats(example_se, genes) head(stats) #>     gene   cell_type mean_expr median_expr detection_rate n_cells #> 1 KBTBD4 mesenchymal         0           0              0       2 #> 2 KBTBD4        beta         0           0              0       3 #> 3 KBTBD4      acinar         0           0              0       6 #> 4 KBTBD4          pp         0           0              0       4 #> 5 KBTBD4       alpha         0           0              0      10 #> 6 KBTBD4 endothelial         0           0              0       2  # 2. Gene specificity spec <- compute_gene_specificity(example_se, genes) spec #>      gene gini_score   top_group  top_mean #> 2  ZNF423  0.8138737 endothelial 1.1493168 #> 4   TBX19  0.7869893        duct 0.5766949 #> 3 CCDC74A  0.7427944 mesenchymal 0.6169727 #> 1  KBTBD4  0.0000000      acinar 0.0000000  # 3. Long-format data expr_long <- build_expr_long(example_se, genes)  # 4. Plots plot_violin(expr_long) #> Warning: Groups with fewer than two datapoints have been dropped. #> ℹ Set `drop = FALSE` to consider such groups for position adjustment purposes. #> Groups with fewer than two datapoints have been dropped. #> ℹ Set `drop = FALSE` to consider such groups for position adjustment purposes. #> Groups with fewer than two datapoints have been dropped. #> ℹ Set `drop = FALSE` to consider such groups for position adjustment purposes. #> Groups with fewer than two datapoints have been dropped. #> ℹ Set `drop = FALSE` to consider such groups for position adjustment purposes. plot_scatter(example_se, genes[1], genes[2])

title: Gene Expression Profiler for Single-Cell RNA-seq Data
text: package includes subset Muraro human pancreas single-cell RNA-seq dataset (example_se) testing purposes.

title: Building long-format expression data — build_expr_long
text: sce SingleCellExperiment object genes Character vector gene names

title: Computing per-group expression statistics — compute_expr_stats
text: sce SingleCellExperiment object genes character vector genes

title: Computing gene specificity (Gini score) — compute_gene_specificity
text: sce SingleCellExperiment object genes character vector genes

what: Example SingleCellExperiment dataset from Muraro Subset — example_se
title: Example SingleCellExperiment dataset from Muraro Subset — example_se
text: small subset Muraro human pancreas dataset contains reduced number genes cells testing.

Example SingleCellExperiment dataset from Muraro Subset — example_se
text: SingleCellExperiment object : assays logcounts counts matrices colData cell metadata including cell type labels rowData gene metadata
